rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and its described intellectual dependencies are prior journal-level reviews (e.g., Huber et al. 2014), not this specific ad-optimization paper. The only match evidence here is a single DOI reference entry with no in-text usage signal, which suggests this is likely one of many cataloged/example articles rather than a substantive theory/method source for the editorial’s claims.
